<!-- Generated from the Commander definitions in cli/src. Do not edit this file. -->

```text
Usage: buzz tokens [options] [command]

Manage deployment tokens

Options:
  -h, --help               display help for command

Commands:
  list                     List your deployment tokens
  create [options] <site>  Create a deployment token for a site
  delete <token-id>        Delete a deployment token
  help [command]           display help for command
```

## Commands

- [`buzz tokens list`](./list/): List your deployment tokens
- [`buzz tokens create`](./create/): Create a deployment token for a site
- [`buzz tokens delete`](./delete/): Delete a deployment token
